---
title: Do citations work in author notes?
author:
  - name: Matti Vuorre
    corresponding: true
    orcid: 0000-0001-5052-066X
    email: mjvuorre@uvt.nl
    affiliations:
      - ref: 1
affiliations:
  - id: 1
    name: Tilburg University
    department: Department of Social Psychology
authornote: Citation [@rcoreteamLanguageEnvironmentStatistical2025]
bibliography: ../../bibliography.bib
format: preprint-typst
---

Citations don't work in author notes, but do work in text body [@rcoreteamLanguageEnvironmentStatistical2025]. I think this is a Quarto feature.
